parents.subject: LU-19147 osd-ldiskfs: tune readcache_max_filesize default based on RAM size

commit.subject: LU-19574 osd: use log2 histogram for in-flight disk IO
commit.message:
LU-19574 osd: use log2 histogram for in-flight disk IO

Use log2 for in-flight disk IO for modern NVME SSDs.

Test result:
```
disk I/Os in flight    ios   % cum % |  ios         % cum %
1:		         0   0   0   | 2704   2   2
2:		         0   0   0   | 3180   2   5
4:		         0   0   0   | 7370   6  11
8:		         0   0   0   | 17365  14  26
16:		         0   0   0   | 40726  35  61
32:		         0   0   0   | 44513  38  99
64:		         0   0   0   |  116   0 100
```

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity env=ONLY=1,ONLY_REPEAT=100
Change-Id: I7b13f42b3ace443901e441ec107e474d057326b1
Signed-off-by: Jinshan Xiong <jinshan.xiong@gmail.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62392
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: wangdi <ddiwang@google.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
